/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/MonteCarloMultiGPU.dir/MonteCarlo_gold.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MonteCarloMultiGPU.dir/MonteCarlo_kernel.cu.o CMakeFiles/MonteCarloMultiGPU.dir/multithreading.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MonteCarloMultiGPU.dir/MonteCarloMultiGPU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MonteCarloMultiGPU.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o MonteCarloMultiGPU   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.6/lib64 /usr/local/cuda-12.6/lib64/libcurand.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
